title: abrotanella forsteroides
intro: Abrotanella forsteroides, also known as Forster's helichrysum, is a small shrub native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Abrotanella forsteroides include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
